title: eragrostis elongata
intro: Eragrostis elongata, also known as the needle grass or grass spikelet, is a type of perennial grass native to Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis elongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for use in herbal remedies, and its leaves and stems can also be used in traditional African medicine preparations.
